# Hrofjagard

*A world generated by Cartogenesis v0.12.0 from seed `aurelia-9`. Regenerate it exactly with `node src/cli.ts generate --seed aurelia-9`.*

## Overview

- **Extent:** 360 × 360 cells
- **Land / ocean:** 33.7% land, 66.3% ocean, 0 lake(s)
- **Climate & life:** dominant biome **Savanna**, 15 biomes in all
- **Peoples:** 20 regions, 14 settlements, 2 realms
- **Capital:** Stasta, seat of House Bungruheim
- **Dominant power:** Neneo (of 1 surviving realm(s))
- **The present year:** 1025 After Reckoning
- **Highest peak:** 4,500 m · **volcanoes:** 5 (2 active)

## Volcanoes

- **Mount Balldaknauheim** — stratovolcano, extinct, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Fjyrkfja** — stratovolcano, active, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Veirkstau** — shield, extinct, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Veibry** — shield, dormant, summit 3,555 m
- **Mount Veiskskovik** — shield, active, summit 3,261 m

- **Mount Hravyheim** — the highest peak
- **The Deihra** — the greatest river

- Zazukhju is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Shaarai.
- Hrostska is a coast of frozen barrens, its folk hardy and sea-wise, seat of Stasta.

## Notable figures

- **Thyrkbru, the Explorer** — Thyrkbru charted the far coasts and traced the Deihra to its source.
- **Dothornhragard, the Mountaineer** — Dothornhragard was first to stand atop Hravyheim and return alive.
- **Beibro, the General** — Beibro broke the long siege of Stasta.
- **Dyrkva, the Architect** — Dyrkva raised the great road between Stasta and Dendomau.
- **Brallbra, the Heretic** — Brallbra was exiled from Stasta for denying the old gods.

- Dendomau (port, trade hub, rich) — Grain, Livestock, Wine, Horses

## Faiths

### the Rite of Marqaa — Marqaa, god of the Harvest

> Marqaa scattered the first seed across Zazukhju; the golden fields were the gift, and the tithe the price.

Followed across 9 region(s).

### the Cult of Stubabruvik — Stubabruvik, god of the Hearth

> Stubabruvik lit the first hearth in Hrostska, and its flame has never since gone out.

Followed across 7 region(s).

### the Rite of Cilenvaulensia — Cilenvaulensia, god of the Sun

> Each dawn Cilenvaulensia drives the sun over Hravyheim; the people of Dausiame greet it with fire.

Followed across 4 region(s).

## Resources & trade

- **Major exports:** Livestock, Horses, Grain, Fish, Stone
- **Wealthiest settlement:** Dendomau
- **Trade hubs:** Stasta, Dendomau
- **Deposits:** Iron ×19, Copper ×14, Gold ×8, Gems ×5, Stone ×48, Coal ×17, Timber ×6, Grain ×20, Livestock ×92, Fish ×10, Furs ×5, Spices ×1, Salt ×6, Horses ×29, Wine ×11

## Legends of the founding age

- **55 After Reckoning** — The city of Stasta was founded on a sheltered harbour, destined to become the seat of power.
- **67 After Reckoning** — Stasta rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Hrofjagard was proclaimed.
- **69 After Reckoning** — The city of Dendomau was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **92 After Reckoning** — Dendomau rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Seomorrauleo was proclaimed.
- **714 After Reckoning** — Hravyheim woke in fire and ash; a hard winter followed, and harvests failed across the land.
- **809 After Reckoning** — Under a long peace, Stasta flourished; its libraries and roads became the wonder of the world.
- **1005 After Reckoning** — A great storm-tide flooded Stasta; the lower quarters were lost to the sea.

A real 360×360 16-bit heightmap is exported alongside this report (`.heightmap16.png` and raw `.heightmap.r16`). The topographic contour map (`.topo.png`) shows the same relief as isolines.
